summary.key_theme: NVIDIA 憑藉強勁的財報表現、800 億美元的股票回購計畫以及在中國市場的長期成長潛力，持續鞏固其 AI 領域的領導地位。

bullish.title: Nvidia's Board Just Authorized an Additional $80 Billion Buyback. Here's What That Really Signals to Investors.
bullish.reason: 公司宣布高達 800 億美元的股票回購計畫，顯示管理層對未來現金流與成長前景的高度信心，直接提振股東價值。

bullish.title: JPMorgan resets Nvidia stock price target after earnings
bullish.reason: 摩根大通在 NVIDIA 發布歷史性財報後上調目標價，反映市場對其 AI 晶片需求持續強勁的認可。

bullish.title: Why BofA Says to “Ignore the Noise” on NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA)
bullish.reason: 美國銀行 (BofA) 上調目標價並建議投資人忽略短期雜訊，強調公司基本面依然強勁。

bullish.title: Nvidia says China included in $200-billion CPU market forecast
bullish.reason: 執行長黃仁勳確認 2,000 億美元的 CPU 市場預測包含中國市場，顯示公司在受限環境下仍具備強大的市場滲透力。

bullish.title: Nvidia’s Hidden $60 Billion Business Is About to Overtake Broadcom
bullish.reason: 分析指出 NVIDIA 除了 GPU 之外，擁有價值 600 億美元的隱藏業務，顯示其產品組合多元化且具備高度競爭力。

bearish.title: Nvidia CEO calls for stricter compliance as Super Micro exports face scrutiny
bearish.reason: 黃仁勳要求 Super Micro 加強出口合規，顯示地緣政治與出口管制對 NVIDIA 供應鏈與合作夥伴仍構成潛在風險。

bearish.title: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Beat Nvidia, AMD, Broadcom, and Intel to Become the Biggest Winner in AI Inference
bearish.reason: 市場觀點認為 Arm Holdings 的商業模式在 AI 推論領域具備超越 NVIDIA 的潛力，對其市場份額構成長期威脅。

bearish.title: The AI Stock That's Been Outperforming Nvidia Since January
bearish.reason: Nebius 等新興競爭對手在股價表現上超越 NVIDIA，反映市場對 AI 基礎設施領域競爭加劇的擔憂。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider NVIDIA (NVDA) After A 7x Multi Year Surge?
neutral.reason: 探討股價在經歷 7 倍漲幅後是否過高，屬於投資人對估值合理性的正常辯論，無明確方向性。

neutral.title: AMC Entertainment, Nvidia, Arm Holdings And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
neutral.reason: 僅反映 NVIDIA 在社交媒體上的熱度，屬於市場情緒指標，對股價無直接基本面影響。

neutral.title: Cerebras vs. Nvidia: Which AI Stock Is the Smarter Buy Right Now?
neutral.reason: 針對不同 AI 晶片公司的投資比較，屬於中性的投資建議分析。
